vocab.meaning: đạt tới tiêu chuẩn, xứng đáng với kỳ vọng
vocab.example: Being part of the varsity team was tough because I constantly felt the need to measure up to the senior players.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu làm việc/tập luyện một cách nghiêm túc và chăm chỉ
vocab.example: Before the championship, the whole team had to knuckle down and practice for three hours every single day.

vocab.meaning: dựa dẫm vào (khi những thứ khác thất bại)
vocab.example: When our main strategy didn't work, we had to fall back on our intensive defensive training to stay in the game.

vocab.meaning: đối đầu/thi đấu trực tiếp với ai đó
vocab.example: It was exhilarating to play off against the top-seeded team in the province during my high school years.

vocab.meaning: vực dậy, phục hồi nhanh chóng (sau thất bại)
vocab.example: Our coach always emphasized the importance of being able to bounce back after a heavy defeat.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua khó khăn, giành chiến thắng trong tình thế hiểm nghèo
vocab.example: Despite being two goals down, our collective effort helped us pull through in the final minutes of the match.

vocab.meaning: không tham gia (do chấn thương hoặc không được chọn)
vocab.example: I had to sit out the entire season last year due to a recurring ankle injury, which was quite frustrating.

vocab.meaning: cổ vũ, khích lệ tinh thần
vocab.example: Even when I wasn't on the field, I was always on the sidelines cheering on my teammates with all my heart.
As a junior member, I really looked up to our team captain for his incredible leadership and discipline.

vocab.meaning: hòa nhập, phù hợp với một tập thể
vocab.example: It took me a while to fit in with the rest of the squad, but eventually, we became like a second family.
